description: Curated subset of the per-candidate label-free absorption-screen rows from the full M3'''' run (Gemma-Scope L12/width-16k SAE on gemma-2-2b). Each row carries the model-internal firing statistics (recall_hole, firing_jaccard, precision, hole_coverage_gain + bootstrap CI, n_eligible) computed by the frozen SAE; the demo re-applies the label-free classify() enum and coverage aggregation to these stats.
